title: Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities - Canada.ca
content:
## Order alternate formats
The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) provides accessible forms, publications, and personalized correspondence in alternate formats. The alternate formats we can send you are:
- Digital audio (MP3) – Content is put onto a digital storage media and can be listened to as an audio file.
- Electronic text (Etext) – Content is put onto a digital storage media and can be read to you with screen reading software.
- Braille – Content is printed on paper with raised dots.
- Large print – Content is printed in large text (18-point type).

## How to order alternate formats
Alternate formats for CRA forms, publications, and personalized correspondence can be ordered online or by phone .
- Forms and publications – Some of the CRA’s forms and publications are available in e-text or large print format on Canada.ca. To use this service: Go to CRA forms or CRA publications Select the form of your choice and download the e-text or large print format If the product you are looking for is not available in your preferred format, you can order it using our alternate formats order form .
Forms and publications – Some of the CRA’s forms and publications are available in e-text or large print format on Canada.ca. To use this service:
- Go to CRA forms or CRA publications
Go to CRA forms or CRA publications
- Select the form of your choice and download the e-text or large print format If the product you are looking for is not available in your preferred format, you can order it using our alternate formats order form .
Select the form of your choice and download the e-text or large print format
If the product you are looking for is not available in your preferred format, you can order it using our alternate formats order form .
- Personalized correspondence – Individuals and business owners can get most of their personalized correspondence online. Use the online mail service in My Account or My Business Account .
Personalized correspondence – Individuals and business owners can get most of their personalized correspondence online. Use the online mail service in My Account or My Business Account .
- For Individuals: 1-800-959-8281
- For Business owners: 1-800-959-5525
